name: COCONUT AND PEANUT SUNDAL
intro: Sundal is literally the first thing I eat whenever I reach Chennai. Tempered and coconut-coated peanuts are what fresh summer snacks should be like. This is one street food of India that needs more love and I decided to start that by sharing my recipe for sundal here.
method: In a pan, heat oil and add the mustard seeds, urad dal, red chilli, asafoetida and curry leaves to it.
Once the spices begin to crackle, add the peanuts and toss well. Allow them to cook in the pan for 3-4 minutes over low flame.
Finish with grated coconut and serve hot.
